response.original_title: What is Royal Air maroc 24-hour cancellation policy for refunds?   —
response.overview: Royal Air Maroc (RAM) provides a full refund without penalty if you cancel within 24 hours of booking, provided the reservation was made at least seven days before the scheduled departure. This policy applies to both refundable and non-refundable fares, allowing passengers to correct mistakes or change plans within the first day.
